prototypes.name: HemeTriage
prototypes.summary: Hematology referral triage: the department's deterministic protocol and Claude as an assistant triage expert give independent opinions; the hematologist adjudicates and signs off.
prototypes.deploy_note: Deliberately not deployed - a public URL would expose a personal ANTHROPIC_API_KEY on a throwaway demo. Runs on localhost:5050.
prototypes.run: cd prototypes/HemeTriage && npm install && cp .env.example .env && npm start
